---
title: "GC_Collate_Data"
author: "Brenden Blakley"
date: "2025-08-25"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

```

```{r , echo=FALSE}

CH4_processed_files <- c("Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xN_Porewater_CH4_202505_1.csv", "Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xN_Porewater_CH4_202505_2.csv", "Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xN_Porewater_CH4_202505_3.csv", "Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xN_Porewater_CH4_202505_4.csv")
data_CH4 <- map(CH4_processed_files, read.csv)

# Combining Files
df_combo <- bind_rows(data_CH4)
```


## Visualize Data
```{r Visualize Data, echo=FALSE}
cat("Visualize Data")

### Ammonia 
CH4_forplot <- df_combo

#need to work out how best to plot these data 

#ensure points are in correct order
CH4_forplot <- CH4_forplot[order(CH4_forplot$Depth_cm), ]

color1 <- c("L1", "L2", "L3", "L4")
color2 <- c("L5", "L6", "L8", "L10")
color3 <- c("L7", "L9", "L11", "L12")
color4 <- c("L13", "L14", "L16", "L15")
color5 <- c("L17", "L18", "L19", "L20")

CH4_forplot <- CH4_forplot %>%
  mutate(Plot_Color = case_when(Plot %in% color1 ~ "Color1",
                                Plot %in% color2 ~ "Color2",
                                Plot %in% color3 ~ "Color3",
                                Plot %in% color4 ~ "Color4",
                                Plot %in% color5 ~ "Color5"))  %>%
  mutate(Treatment = ifelse(
    CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
      N_Treatment == "Amended",
    "eCO2 & eN",
    ifelse(
      CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
        N_Treatment == "Ambient",
      "eCO2 & aN",
      ifelse(CO2_Treatment == "Ambient" &
               N_Treatment == "Amended"  , "aCO2 & eN" , "aCO2 & aN")
    )))

#make plot
viz_CH4_plot_2 <- ggplot(data = CH4_forplot, 
                            aes(x = CH4_Conc_uM, y = Depth_cm, color = Plot_Color)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_path(size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Color1" = "#FFD500",
    "Color2" = "#00D0FF",
    "Color3" = "#FF0075",
    "Color4" = "#ff6a3a",
    "Color5" = "#80d280"
  )) +
  facet_grid(Treatment ~ ., scales = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "CH4 (uM)", 
       y = "Depth (cm)", 
       title = "Porewater CH4 by Replicate",
       color = "Replicate") +
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(20, 40, 80)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    )
  )

viz_CH4_plot_2

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
### Plot Style 2

#need to work out how best to plot these data

viz_CH4_plot2 <- ggplot(data = CH4_forplot, aes(
  x = as.factor(CO2_Treatment),
  y = CH4_Conc_uM,
  fill = as.factor(Treatment),
  color = as.factor(N_Treatment)
)) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")
  ) +
  facet_grid(Depth_cm ~ N_Treatment, scales = "fixed") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "eCO2 & eN" = "#DB5461",
    "eCO2 & aN" = "#454ADE", 
    "aCO2 & eN" = "white",
    "aCO2 & aN" = "white"
  ),
    breaks = c("eCO2", "eCO2_N", "N", "Ambient"),
    labels = c("eCO2","eCO2","aCO2","aCO2")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Ambient" = "#454ADE",
    "Amended" = "#DB5461"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ",
       y = "CH4 (umol/L)",
       title = "CO2xN: Porewater Methane (Alternate View)",
       fill = "CO2 Treatment:",
       color = "N Treatment:") +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    )
  ) +
coord_flip()
print(viz_CH4_plot2)


```
